# RelahConvert

> Free online image and PDF tools. 50+ tools to compress, convert, edit, merge, and split files in bulk. Available in 25 languages.

## What is RelahConvert?

RelahConvert is a free online toolkit for working with images and PDFs. Compress, resize, convert, crop, watermark, merge, split, protect, and edit files in bulk. Every tool is free to use, with sign-in optional for cloud save.

## Image Tools

- Compress Image — reduce JPG, PNG, and WebP file size while keeping quality
- Resize Image — change image dimensions in pixels or percentage
- Resize in KB — resize images to a target file size in KB
- Crop Image — crop any image to exact pixel dimensions
- Rotate Image — rotate images by any angle, batch process
- Flip Image — flip images horizontally or vertically
- Black & White — convert images to grayscale
- Watermark Image — add text or image watermarks
- Round Image Corners — add rounded corners to images
- Pixelate Image — pixelate faces, license plates, or any area
- Blur Face — automatically blur faces in photos
- Remove Background — AI-powered background removal
- Passport Photo Maker — create passport photos for 160+ countries
- Image Splitter — split images into grid pieces
- Merge Images — combine multiple images into one
- Meme Generator — create memes with custom text and 100+ templates
- HTML to Image — convert HTML markup to PNG/JPG
- Image to ICO — create favicons from any image

## Image Format Converters

- JPG to PNG, PNG to JPG
- JPG to WebP, WebP to JPG
- PNG to WebP, WebP to PNG
- JPG to PDF, PNG to PDF, PDF to PNG
- GIF to JPG, GIF to PNG
- BMP to JPG, BMP to PNG
- TIFF to JPG
- JPG to GIF, PNG to GIF
- HEIC to JPG
- JPG to SVG
- SVG to PNG, SVG to JPG

## PDF Tools

- Merge PDF — combine multiple PDFs into one document
- Split PDF — split a PDF into pages or custom ranges
- Compress PDF — reduce PDF file size
- Rotate PDF — rotate PDF pages by 90, 180, or 270 degrees
- Reorder Pages — drag and drop to rearrange PDF pages
- Extract Pages — extract specific pages as a new PDF
- Remove Pages — delete unwanted pages from a PDF
- Add Page Numbers — add page numbers with custom position and font size
- Watermark PDF — add text or image watermarks to PDF pages
- Crop PDF — adjust margins to trim PDF pages
- Protect PDF — add password protection with AES-256 encryption
- Unlock PDF — remove password protection from a PDF
- Extract Images from PDF — pull embedded images out at original resolution

## Supported Languages

English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Arabic, Italian, Japanese, Russian, Korean, Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Bulgarian, Catalan, Dutch, Greek, Hindi, Indonesian, Malay, Polish, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

## Key Facts

- 50+ free tools across image and PDF categories
- Bulk processing — apply the same operation to many files at once
- Sign-in optional for cloud save
- Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG, ICO, BMP, TIFF, HEIC, PDF
- Works on desktop and mobile
- Available at https://relahconvert.com
